specific_question: How many distinct charging station models and power delivery protocols does Elexion Automotive's quality assurance team test for compatibility as of December 2024?
answer: As of December 2024, the Elexion Automotive's quality assurance team tests charging compatibility across 87 distinct charging station models, 15 CCS protocol versions and 22 Level 2 charger configurations, with plans to expand to 120 charging scenarios by 2025.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
